1.premise: Fake Arabic can become real Arabic through video-game hostage phrases.
Claiming to speak Arabic implies genuine fluency, but reveals rhythmic nonsense syllables.

2.premise: "La" can mean nonsense chanting or actual Arabic, so the first attempt was both.

3.premise: Authentic-sounding Arabic could be a Call of Duty hostage command memorized from the game.

lines.text: In high school, my art teacher was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Hey, does anybody in here know how to speak Arabic?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And she was getting ready to train us for, like, a calligraphy lesson.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I was like, "Fuck it."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "Yeah, I speak Arabic."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She goes, "Go ahead, Matt. Speak some Arabic for us."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Arabic for us and I said, "La la la la la la la."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And everybody laughed in the classroom except for her.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: She was like, "Matt, that's rude.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's insensitive.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Does anybody here actually know how to speak some Arabic?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I was like, "Well, yeah.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I do."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And she was like, "Are you actually going to say something in Arabic this time?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I'm like, "For sure."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I said, "But I just did."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It wasn't cool.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm like, "I'm not going to do it again."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: She goes, "Go ahead."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I said, in perfect Arabic, I said, "Lakadam secto benachina."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And she gasped.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She was like, "Oh my God."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She's like, "That was beautiful.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Do you know what it translates to?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I said, "Hell yeah, I learned it from Call of Duty.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It means we've got control of a hostage."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's just true story, you guys.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Thank you so much.
lines.label: fluff
